inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations ex CCP €2,672M minus capex (intangibles €325M + PP&E €55M) ÷ 183.1M shares
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 mid-cycle base; Q1 2026 net revenue ex treasury +12% run-rate above trend (not inflated into starting cash flow); treasury result declining with rates

bear.notes: Trading volume mean-reversion, treasury headwind, Allfunds integration delay

base.notes: 8% organic revenue CAGR guide to 2028; ~20× spot P/FCF → 22× exit

bull.notes: Sustained volatility + digital assets + Allfunds synergy

option_scan.question: Material options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Allfunds acquisition and digital-asset rails are strategic but not separately sized in Lawrence base; FY2025 owner cash path sufficient for stance gate
